purpose: Seed benchmark for evaluating paper-to-skill conversion on agent and LLM-method papers with clear reusable workflows.
selection_criteria: The paper contains an operational method that can plausibly become an agent skill.
The paper has identifiable inputs, workflow steps, validation signals, and limitations.
The paper supports at least one downstream task for skill-vs-summary evaluation.
The paper is publicly accessible from a stable primary source.

papers.title: The AI Scientist-v2: Workshop-Level Automated Scientific Discovery via Agentic Tree Search
papers.conversion_focus: Convert an end-to-end research automation workflow into a skill with phases for hypothesis generation, experiments, analysis, writing, and review.
papers.benchmark_task: Ask an agent to plan a small automated research run from a user idea using the generated skill.

papers.title: AIDE: AI-Driven Exploration in the Space of Code
papers.conversion_focus: Convert code-space tree search, debugging, and solution selection into a skill for iterative ML/code optimization.
papers.benchmark_task: Ask an agent to improve a simple ML baseline while logging search decisions and failed branches.

papers.title: Agent Laboratory: Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants
papers.conversion_focus: Convert a multi-stage research assistant workflow into a skill with human feedback checkpoints.
papers.benchmark_task: Ask an agent to turn a small research idea into a literature-experiment-report plan with explicit user checkpoints.

papers.title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
papers.conversion_focus: Convert automatic curriculum, executable skill library, and iterative prompting into a reusable agent skill.
papers.benchmark_task: Ask an agent to design a reusable skill-library workflow for a toy environment.

papers.title: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
papers.conversion_focus: Convert verbal feedback, reflective memory, and retry loops into a skill for agents that learn from failed attempts.
papers.benchmark_task: Ask an agent to solve a small coding or reasoning task twice, using reflection after the first failure.

papers.title: SWE-agent: Agent-Computer Interfaces Enable Automated Software Engineering
papers.conversion_focus: Convert agent-computer interface design principles into a skill for tool-facing coding agents.
papers.benchmark_task: Ask an agent to specify a minimal coding-agent interface for repository navigation, editing, and testing.

papers.title: Toolformer: Language Models Can Teach Themselves to Use Tools
papers.conversion_focus: Convert self-supervised tool-use data generation and API-call selection into a skill for tool-use extraction.
papers.benchmark_task: Ask an agent to design a small tool-use annotation and filtering workflow.
